function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-29
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-29                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

function.message: Completed the next inbox request: added YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_29__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md` using the finance invoice schema, extracted visible fields and line items, preserved the existing note body verbatim below frontmatter, kept changes focused, and then removed the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used schema-defined fields only, preserved full original body during migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked for OCR/frontmatter extraction on the specified invoice note. The target file visibly contained all required invoice schema fields and line items, enabling a complete and exact migration per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md` and migration workflows. No clarification or unsupported capability was needed.
